item.title: Samantha Bee: How to Survive Menopause
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune is located at 1303 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. All ages show, bar with valid photo I.D. There is an overall 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. No Elevator. Ramps only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

item.title: Harland Williams: Comzilla Comedy Tour
item.description:
Friday, March 27, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune Theatre is located in Seattle, Washington at 1313 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. This is a reserved show. For patrons needing assistance with accessible seating, Ushers are available to assist when you arrive. 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders cancelled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. Mobile ticket delivery will be delayed until 4 days prior to event. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email or phone if any assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us by email at accessibility@stgpresents.org or call us at 206-682-1414 ext. 5. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. The freestanding chair can be removed to accommodate a wheelchair.

item.title: Alyssa Edwards - Thanks For Everything Tour 2026
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

Now with Guest Stars Tony & The Kiki! The Neptune Theatre is located in Seattle, Washington at 1313 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. This is a reserved show. For patrons needing assistance with accessible seating, Ushers are available to assist when you arrive. 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders cancelled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. Mobile ticket delivery will be delayed until 4 days prior to event. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

item.title: Rory Scovel: Know Your Enemy Tour
item.description:
Friday, April 10, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune Theatre is located in Seattle, Washington at 1313 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. This is a reserved show. For patrons needing assistance with accessible seating, Ushers are available to assist when you arrive. 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders cancelled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. Mobile ticket delivery will be delayed until 4 days prior to event. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email or phone if any assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us by email at accessibility@stgpresents.org or call us at 206-682-1414 ext. 5. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. The freestanding chair can be removed to accommodate a wheelchair.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

item.title: Drew & Ellie Holcomb
item.description:
Friday, April 24, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

GA Seated Drew & Ellie Holcomb have partnered with the anti-slavery non-profit International Justice Mission to donate $1 (one dollar) from each ticket sale to support the organization's efforts to rescue children trapped in modern-day slavery and protect people in poverty from violence. The Neptune is located at 1303 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. All ages show, bar with valid photo I.D. There is an overall 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. No Elevator. Ramps only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email or phone if any assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us by email at accessibility@stgpresents.org or call us at 206-682-1414 ext. 5. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. The freestanding chair can be removed to accommodate a wheelchair.

item.title: Toxic By Abhishek Upmanyu - Live in Seattle (Same Show as 2024)
item.description:
Wednesday, May 6, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune is located at 1303 Northeast 45th Street in Seattle's University District. There is a ticket limit of 8 tickets per person and per credit card on this event. Accounts found in violation of the posted ticket limit may be cancelled without notice. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. There is no elevator. Stairs and ramps only to the balcony level. Recommended for age 16+. This show is performed in Hindi. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

item.description:
Thursday, May 7, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune Theatre is located in Seattle, Washington at 1313 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. The main floor is GA standing & balcony is RSVD seated. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location. 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders cancelled at the venue's discretion. TM+ Resale is disabled, and ticket transferring is delaying until 7 days prior to the event. Mobile ticket delivery will be delayed until 4 days prior to event. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety There is no elevator. Stairs only to the balcony level. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email or phone if any assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us by email at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. The freestanding chair can be removed to accommodate a wheelchair.

item.title: The Wood Brothers
item.description:
Friday, May 8, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Wood Brothers have partnered with American Friends of Canadian Conservation so that $1 per ticket will support The Nature Trust of British Columbia (NTBC) in their efforts to conserve ecologically-rich wetlands and protect irreplaceable land from development. Every $1 donated will be matched by the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service with $2 so more endangered wetlands can be saved. If you?d like to learn more, please visit this link. The Neptune is located at 1303 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. All ages show, bar with valid photo I.D. There is an overall 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. No Elevator. Ramps only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety This is a general admission event. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune Theatre is located in Seattle, Washington at 1313 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. This is a general admission event. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location. Show is performed in both English & Spanish. TM+ Resale has been disabled, and ticket transferring has been delayed until 3 days prior to event. Mobile ticket delivery will be delayed until 3 days prior to event. 4 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders cancelled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels. item.title: Bruce Hornsby & The Noisemakers: Indigo Park Tour
item.description:
Friday, June 5, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune is located at 1303 NE 45th Street in Seattle's University District. All ages show, bar with valid photo I.D. There is an overall 8 ticket limit per patron. Patrons exceeding the ticket limit will have their orders canceled at the venue's discretion. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. No Elevator. Ramps only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety This is a general admission event. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location. When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location.

From STG - Neptune Theatre

item.title: Belle & Sebastian: 30th Anniversary Tour, Performing "Tigermilk"
item.description:
Saturday, June 13, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Neptune Theatre, 1303 NE 45th Street, Seattle, WA

The Neptune is located at 1303 Northeast 45th Street in Seattle's University District. There is a ticket limit of 8 tickets per person and per credit card on this event. Accounts found in violation of the posted ticket limit may be cancelled without notice. All sales are final. No refunds or exchanges. Mobile barcodes delayed until 4 days prior to event. Venue reserves the right to change delivery methods. Unless otherwise noted, each person must have a ticket regardless of age. No babies in arms. There is no elevator. Stairs and ramps only to the balcony level. Metal detectors & bag search at door. Arrive early. No weapons. www.stgpresents.org/about/safety When purchasing ADA accessible seating, please feel free to contact us by email if assistance is needed with accommodations or companion seating; you may reach us at accessibility@stgpresents.org. Each accessible seat houses an armless freestanding chair for patrons with mobility impairments and their companions. Please note that our historic theatre has no elevator to the balcony levels. The ADA section on the seating map does not represent a specific seat location.

From STG - Neptune Theatre
